title: Simply Modded Survival
description: A simple modded survival modpack, featuring Create, Valkyrien Skies and ComputerCraft.
body:
### About

A simple, modded survival modpack. It features Create, Valkyrien Skies, ComputerCraft, Farmer's Delight, a few tweaks / optimizations, and a bunch of extensions and compatibility mods between them.

The goal is to make a simple, lightweight yet powerful modpack based on 4 main mods.

### Installation

> **Private:**
> Ask [@Virinas-code](https://modrinth.com/user/Virinas-code) to be added as a "Viewer" member to the modpack.

#### With the Modrinth app (.mrpack file)

Download the latest release and install it with the Modrinth application.

#### Other launchers (mods.zip file)

Click on the latest release, go at the bottom of the page and download the `mods.zip` file. It contains all the mods included in the modpack (however, it doesn't include any config). You can then use them with your favorite launcher.

### Features (mods)

> **Coming soon:** Detailed mod list

- Valkyrien Skies
- Computer Craft
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- \+ A lot of compatibility mods between these

### FAQ

#### Q: What is the difference between Alpha, Beta and Releases?

**A:** Alpha releases are "spoilers" of the next release and are practically unusable. Beta release are working versions, however they aren't properly tested. Releases are working, tested releases.

#### Q: Which versionning is used?

**A:** We use a SemVer-like versioning style (`MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH`).

#### Q: Is there any incompatible mods or known issues?

**A:** In testing **`Iris Shaders`** made **`ComputerCraft`** monitors look dimmed on Valkyrien Skies ships. On Linux, during devlopment, I encountered issues with `libopenal` crashing the game.

#### Q: Is it planned to have **`Clockwork`**?

**A:** Currently **`Clockwork`** is still in beta, so we decided not to include it in the modpack.

#### Q: Will it be available for other versions?

**A:** No, our current goal is to make a stable modpack for a single version.
